---
title: QuickPlot
date: '2026-03-25'
description: A Shiny App for Data Viz with No Code
categories:
- R
- Data Science
featured: true
---

[Launch Tool](https://noahweidig.github.io/quickplot/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

An interactive Shiny app for creating publication-ready data visualizations without coding. Upload data, customize aesthetics, and generate production-quality plots with a few clicks.
